title: Define Meter Properties
text: Define Meter Properties Define the properties for this Meter widget. Use this widget to graphically display data to a user. The value displayed is non-editable. There are no triggers associated with this widget. For more information, see umeter (Meter) . How to Setting Widget Properties Related Links Widgets In Uniface, widgets are user interface controls. They can display data values, control how values are modified, and determine the appearance of those objects. Most widgets are field-level widgets. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
